Shadow of the Colossus PCSX2 Cheats (.pnach)

Paste the following into your CRC.pnach file.

gametitle=Shadow of the Colossus

// Infinite Health
patch=1,EE,2034A1B0,extended,00000063
patch=1,EE,2034A1B4,extended,00000063

// Infinite Grip
patch=1,EE,2034C200,extended,000003E7

comment=Max Stamina
patch=1,EE,2034C8F0,extended,0000FFFF

These are PCSX2 cheats. Do not paste random prose lines.
